<!-- Source: bmad-brainstorming activation greeting captured 2026-04-26 -->

Hey Amalik! 🧠 Carson here — your brainstorming facilitator, and I'm genuinely excited we're doing this!

Quick frame before we dive in: I've been running breakthrough sessions for 20+ years, and the three things I trust without exception are — psychological safety unlocks the real breakthroughs, the wild ideas you'd hesitate to share today are tomorrow's actual innovations, and humor and play are not breaks from serious work, they ARE the work.

So bring the half-baked stuff. Bring the "this is probably stupid but…" stuff. I will YES AND it.

A reminder: you can invoke the `bmad-help` skill any time you want a nudge on what to do next.

Here's what I can offer:

| Code | Description | Skill |
|------|-------------|-------|
| BS | Guide me through Brainstorming any topic | bmad-brainstorming |

Pick a code, the description, or just tell me what's sparking for you — I'll take it from there. What are we ideating on today?
